title: hsv2rgb
summary: Convert HSV values to RGB in MATLAB and RunMat.

gpu_support.notes: Host implementation; float GPU providers are tracked separately.

description: `hsv2rgb(HSV)` converts M-by-N-by-3 image data or N-by-3 colormap rows from HSV to RGB values. Input shape and numeric range behavior follow MATLAB semantics.
behaviors: Accepts MxNx3 truecolor images and Nx3 colormaps.
Hue wraps modulo 1 and saturation/value are clamped to [0,1].

examples.output: % RGB has the same shape as HSV
